title: X6852-15.1.0.151SP02-IN001PF001AZ-15.1.2.155-IN001PF001AZ_20260116154233
description:
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.

Update Version:
X6852-15.1.2.155(IN001PF001AZ)

Update Content:
OS Version Upgraded to XOS 15.1.2 for a smarter user interface that gives your device a new look.
Changed Functions:
1.Updated Google Security Patch to February 1, 2026.
2.Upgrades Folax Voice Assistant version.
3.AI Writing: Delivers scenario-based text polishing for social media posts.
4.Screenshot: Added a Smart Screen Recognition entry below the screenshot thumbnail to identify QR codes on the page.
5.Battery & Power Saving: Optimized visual design, simplified mode selection process and enhanced user experience.
6.Theme Store: Supports theme customization for system apps – Phone, Contacts and Message.
Fixed Issues:
1.Fixes the occasional unresponsiveness issue when switching aspect ratios in Portrait Master for smoother operation.
2.Fixes the occasional compatibility issue with PC Connect for more stable collaboration.
3.Fixes the occasional stability issue during screen recording for a more reliable recording experience.
4.Fixes the occasional unlocking failure issue under specific scenarios to make the unlocking process more convenient and secure.
Reminding:
1. Visit the XClub forum (https://www.infinix.club) for more information.
